entities.name: One Sin and Hundreds of Good Deeds
entities.loreSummary: An abnormality representing confession and atonement.

connectionInsights.sinclair: Sinclair's base E.G.O is directly derived from a fragment of this abnormality. Both embody the agonizing process of confession.
connectionInsights.ryoshu: Wields the 'Penitence' portion of her Lobotomy E.G.O Identity, representing the restrictive, moralistic side of the spectrum.

entities.name: Plague Doctor
entities.loreSummary: A masked doctor who claims to cure all diseases, but hides a terrifying truth behind his 12 apostles.

entities.name: Fairy Festival
entities.loreSummary: Beautiful fairies that offer a feast to workers, only to consume them once the meal is finished.

connectionInsights.ishmael: Wields the 'Sloshing' Lobotomy E.G.O Identity, mirroring the fairy's feast-then-consume nature through liquid-based mechanics.

entities.name: Opened Can of WellCheers
entities.loreSummary: A refreshing soda can that contains the essence of the ocean—and the sailors who never returned.

entities.name: Scorched Girl
entities.loreSummary: A girl who burned her own world to ashes in a desperate attempt to be heard.

entities.name: Beauty and the Beast
entities.loreSummary: A cursed entity that transfers its monstrous form between itself and its caretaker.

entities.name: Forsaken Murderer
entities.loreSummary: An experiment gone wrong, shackled by the metal plates hammered into his skull.

connectionInsights.faust: Wields the 'Regret' Lobotomy E.G.O Identity, utilizing the heavy shackles and industrial theme of the abnormality.

entities.name: Punishing Bird
entities.loreSummary: A small bird that enforces justice with a lethal beak. One of the three birds of the Black Forest.

entities.name: Warm-hearted Woodsman
entities.loreSummary: A construct that cuts out the hearts of others to fill its own empty, mechanical chest.

entities.name: Der Freischütz
entities.loreSummary: A huntsman whose seventh magic bullet hits the one he loves most.

connectionInsights.outis: Linked via the 'Magic Bullet' E.G.O. Both are tactical masters whose actions inevitably bring tragedy to their own side.

entities.name: The Snow Queen
entities.loreSummary: A frozen ethereal entity that traps hearts in blocks of ice to keep them perfect forever.

entities.name: Happy Teddy Bear
entities.loreSummary: A sentient toy that desires nothing but to be hugged... until the hug becomes a crush.

entities.name: Singing Machine
entities.loreSummary: An industrial grinder that transforms people into beautiful, haunting music.

entities.name: Snow White's Apple
entities.loreSummary: A rotting princess encased in the vines of a poisoned apple tree.

entities.name: Little Red Riding Hooded Mercenary
entities.loreSummary: A high-ranking mercenary consumed by an eternal hatred for the Big Bad Wolf.

entities.name: Big and Will be Bad Wolf
entities.loreSummary: An endless hunger that grows with every meal. The eternal rival of the Mercenary.

entities.name: The Queen of Hatred
entities.loreSummary: A magical girl who creates villains just so she can play the role of the hero.

connectionInsights.don-quixote: Wields the 'In the Name of Love and Hate' Identity. The Queen's desperate performance of heroism perfectly mirrors Don Quixote's own 'Golden Dream' delusions.

entities.name: Big Bird
entities.loreSummary: A multi-eyed bird that consumes heads to 'save' workers from the forest's darkness.

entities.name: Judgement Bird
entities.loreSummary: The scales of the forest that bring execution as the only form of balance.

entities.name: The Little Prince
entities.loreSummary: A fungus-enthralling entity that replaces individual will with a unified, spore-driven bliss.

entities.name: Nothing There
entities.loreSummary: A terrifying shapeshifter that mimics human behavior and speech to hide its biology.

entities.name: The Silent Orchestra
entities.loreSummary: An ensemble that plays a symphony so beautiful it demands the lives of its audience.

entities.name: WhiteNight
entities.loreSummary: A messianic entity that demands total submission from its twelve apostles.

entities.name: CENSORED
entities.loreSummary: A cognitohazard so intense it cannot be represented by the human mind or the facility's cameras.

entities.name: Funeral of the Dead Butterflies
entities.loreSummary: An abnormality that offers a quiet rest to those who are exhausted from the world.

connectionInsights.yi-sang: Wields the 'Solemn Lament' Lobotomy E.G.O Identity. The butterfly motif and the concept of a 'quiet rest' deeply resonate with Yi Sang's poetic resignation.

entities.name: Meat Lantern
entities.loreSummary: An abnormality that hides beneath the ground, using a beautiful flower as a lure.

connectionInsights.don-quixote: Wields the 'Lantern' Lobotomy E.G.O Identity, reflecting the gap between her bright 'heroic' exterior and the hidden hunger of reality.

entities.name: Spider Bud
entities.loreSummary: A spider that protects its cocoon with absolute devotion, punishing any who touch it.

connectionInsights.ryoshu: Wields the 'Red Eyes' portion of her Lobotomy E.G.O Identity, embodying the protective yet lethal nature of the spider.

entities.name: The Knight of Despair
entities.loreSummary: One of the four magical girls. A knight whose protection was lost to betrayal, leaving only the weight of her sword.

connectionInsights.rodion: Wields the 'Sword Sharpened with Tears' Identity. The Knight's betrayal and subsequent despair parallel Rodion's own guilt over her past actions.

entities.name: Ardor Blossom Moth
entities.loreSummary: An abnormality that consumes everything in its path with scorching flames, leaving only ashes behind.

connectionInsights.faust: Wields the 'Ardor Blossom Star' Identity. The moth's self-destructive drive for the 'star' mirrors Faust's own pursuit of knowledge.

entities.name: Red Sheet
entities.loreSummary: An abnormality wrapped in red talismans that carry curses and blessings alike.

connectionInsights.sinclair: Wields the 'Red Sheet' Lobotomy E.G.O Identity, utilizing the talismanic powers to balance his own internal volatility.

entities.name: Drifting Fox
entities.loreSummary: An abnormality that brings rain wherever it goes, wandering aimlessly through the City.

connectionInsights.heathcliff: Wields the 'Sunshower' Lobotomy E.G.O Identity. The fox's aimless wandering and the melancholic rain mirror Heathcliff's own sense of displacement.
connectionInsights.yi-sang: Connected via the 'Effloresced E.G.O::Spicebush' Identity, which shares the Sunshower thematic resonance and atmospheric decay.

entities.name: Apocalypse Bird
entities.loreSummary: The fusion of the three birds. It represents the end of the forest and the ultimate failure of protection.

entities.name: Lobotomy Corporation
entities.loreSummary: The primary energy Wing of the City. Its facility structure consists of 10 specialized teams, each managed by a Sephirah.

connectionInsights.dante: Directly resonates with Golden Boughs to manifest Sapling of Light abilities (Durante), which are structurally named after L-Corp Sephirot (Pigritia, Superbia, Morositas).
connectionInsights.faust: Maintains structural ties through the 'Lobotomy Corp. Remnant' Identity and 'Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret'. Accesses L-Corp knowledge via her bargain with Mephistopheles' engine.
connectionInsights.yi-sang: Deeply entwined with cognitive extraction and the invention of Mirror Technology. Wields the 'Solemn Lament' Identity derived from L-Corp's archives.

entities.name: Control Team
entities.loreSummary: Responsible for facility-wide coordination and management.

entities.name: Information Team
entities.loreSummary: Manages the Abnormality database and internal communication.

entities.name: Training Team
entities.loreSummary: Dedicated to employee development and survival in high-risk zones.

entities.name: Security Team
entities.loreSummary: Maintains physical containment and suppressive protocols.

entities.name: Central Command Team
entities.loreSummary: The nerve center connecting the upper and lower layers of the facility.

entities.name: Disciplinary Team
entities.loreSummary: Suppresses high-risk (WAW/ALEPH) abnormalities.

entities.name: Welfare Team
entities.loreSummary: Maintains employee mental health and facility stability.

entities.name: Extraction Team
entities.loreSummary: Extracts E.G.O equipment from Abnormalities.

entities.name: Record Team
entities.loreSummary: Preserves the archives and historical data of the facility.

entities.name: Architecture Team
entities.loreSummary: The deepest layer of the facility where the Seed of Light is refined.

entities.name: Malkuth
entities.loreSummary: The Sephirah of the Control Team. Later the Patron Librarian of the Floor of History.

entities.name: Yesod
entities.loreSummary: The Sephirah of the Information Team. Later the Patron Librarian of the Floor of Tech. Sciences.

entities.name: Hod
entities.loreSummary: The Sephirah of the Training Team. Later the Patron Librarian of the Floor of Literature.

entities.name: Netzach
entities.loreSummary: The Sephirah of the Security Team. Later the Patron Librarian of the Floor of Art.

entities.name: Tiphereth
entities.loreSummary: The Sephirah of the Central Command Team. Later the Patron Librarian of the Floor of Natural Sciences.

entities.name: Gebura
entities.loreSummary: The Sephirah of the Disciplinary Team. Later the Patron Librarian of the Floor of Language.

entities.name: Chesed
entities.loreSummary: The Sephirah of the Welfare Team. Later the Patron Librarian of the Floor of Social Sciences.

entities.name: Binah
entities.loreSummary: The Sephirah of the Extraction Team. Later the Patron Librarian of the Floor of Philosophy.

connectionInsights.faust: Connected via the Extraction Team; Faust's role as a hoarder of forbidden knowledge mirrors Binah's role in L-Corp's deep facility layers.
connectionInsights.outis: Linked via the 'Magic Bullet' E.G.O (Der Freischütz), which Binah manages through the Extraction Team.

entities.name: Hokma
entities.loreSummary: The Sephirah of the Record Team. Later the Patron Librarian of the Floor of Religion.

entities.name: Floor of History
entities.loreSummary: The first floor of the Library, dedicated to the records of the past.

entities.name: Floor of Tech. Sciences
entities.loreSummary: A floor dedicated to the understanding of the Library's complex mechanisms.

entities.name: Floor of Literature
entities.loreSummary: Where the stories and souls within books are translated into reality.

entities.name: Floor of Art
entities.loreSummary: Dedicated to the creative expression of the City's suffering.

entities.name: Floor of Natural Sciences
entities.loreSummary: Investigates the physical laws and metaphysical truth of the Library.

entities.name: Floor of Language
entities.loreSummary: The front line of the Library's defense, focused on suppressive combat.

entities.name: Floor of Social Sciences
entities.loreSummary: Examines the societal impact and communal weight of the City's history.

entities.name: Floor of Philosophy
entities.loreSummary: The deepest exploration of why the City must exist.

entities.name: Floor of Religion
entities.loreSummary: Where the final questions of faith and purpose are archived.

entities.name: The Director's Room
entities.loreSummary: The core of the Library where the final outcome of the Seed of Light is determined.

entities.name: Ayin (A)
entities.loreSummary: The creator of L Corp and the architect of the Seed of Light project.

entities.name: Angela
entities.loreSummary: The AI administrator of L Corp and the current Director of the Library.

entities.name: N Corp
entities.loreSummary: Mirror Technology corporation. Operates the fanatic Nagel und Hammer inquisitors.

entities.name: W Corp
entities.loreSummary: Manages the Warp Train transportation network and employs the secretive Cleanup Agents.

entities.name: K Corp
entities.loreSummary: Produces miraculous HP Ampules derived from the Tearful Thing. Defended by the Excision Staff.

entities.name: R Corp
entities.loreSummary: Private Military Company utilizing specialized beast-themed mercenary packs (Rabbit, Reindeer, Rhino).

entities.name: J Corp
entities.loreSummary: A gambling-focused district with a ruthless casino tax system. Birthplace of the Yurodiviye.

entities.name: T Corp
entities.loreSummary: Corporation that commodifies Time and Color as luxury goods. Setting of the Timekilling Time event.

entities.name: Hana Association
entities.loreSummary: The head of all Fixer associations, responsible for ranking Fixers and managing high-level contracts.

entities.name: Zwei Association
entities.loreSummary: Specializes in public safety, security, and protection. Known as the 'Shield of the City'.

entities.name: Shi Association
entities.loreSummary: Specializes in covert operations and assassination, often overworked by the Association's bureaucracy.

entities.name: Dieci Association
entities.loreSummary: Focused on the retrieval of knowledge and information, utilizing 'Understanding' as a combat force.

entities.name: The Thumb
entities.loreSummary: One of the Five Fingers. Governs with absolute hierarchy and manners (Li). Subsidiaries: Kurokumo Clan, Stray Dogs.

entities.name: The Index
entities.loreSummary: One of the Five Fingers. Operates based on absolute 'Prescripts' (Xin). Subsidiaries: Proxy system, Messengers.

entities.name: The Middle
entities.loreSummary: One of the Five Fingers. Values brotherhood and vengeance (Yi). Subsidiaries: Twinhook Pirates, Dead Rabbits.

entities.name: The Ring
entities.loreSummary: One of the Five Fingers. Obsessed with the distorted 'Art' and wisdom (Zhi).

entities.name: The Pinky
entities.loreSummary: One of the Five Fingers. Represents Benevolence (Ren), often operating through infiltration.
